sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT net_sol, entry_drift_pct d, exit_reason FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-fable-freshdip' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND entry_drift_pct < -20 ) SELECT exit_reason, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),3) net, ROUND(AVG(d),2) avg_drift FROM t GROUP BY exit_reason
